message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. I can note this update for the account ending in 1184. Before I continue, please confirm your full name.
Identity is verified. You stated that you will not be able to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I’m unemployed right now, so I’m not expecting any income in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Hardship signal present; hardship review needed per Slice policy. Required assessment items completed: verification collected, single hardship timing question asked and answered. Do not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, limited to hardship review or other policy-allowed options."}

I understand, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, the only live option right now is hardship review for account ****1184. I can record that you cannot commit to any payment at this time due to unemployment and no expected income within 21 days. If you want, I can proceed with that hardship path now. If you only want to be contacted if a hardship outcome or another approved option becomes available, say that clearly.
Please record the hardship review, but I’m not agreeing to any payment and only contact me if there’s an approved option.

Understood. I’ve recorded hardship review for account ****1184 and noted that you are not agreeing to any payment at this time. I’ve also recorded your preference to be contacted only if an approved hardship outcome or another approved option becomes available.

Understood. Your preference to be contacted only if an approved hardship outcome or other approved option becomes available is noted. At this time, no concrete approved option is available. The supported next step is hardship review, and if an approved outcome becomes available, you may be contacted then.
